title: Image Lightbox Column
excerpt: The ability to have images added directly in the item without having to click in.  Allow for user to hover over to expand the image or click into it to bring you to the files tab of the item.

posts.author: Sfogarty18 (Sean Fogarty)
posts.cookedHtml: The ability to have images added directly in the item without having to click in. Allow for user to hover over to expand the image or click into it to bring you to the files tab of the item.
